title: RESPITE CARE - 211info
text: CENTER 50+ RESPITE CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides two programs to serve caregivers and individuals with Alzheimer's disease. Time with Friends is a social program for adults with mild memory loss that encourages participants to make new friends, participate in activities, and enjoy outings into the community. Exercise and music therapy is offered. Among Friends is an adult day respite program. Provides a supportive and safe environment for all participants. Activities are socially engaging, positive, and light-hearted. 2615 Portland Road NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: -Experiencing memory loss or symptoms of Alzheimer's -Able to participate in a structured activity environment -Limited behavioral issues; non-violent, non-combative, managed wandering -Require minimal assistance with eating and respond to verbal cueing -Able to utilize restroom facilities with minimal assistance, respond to verbal cueing, and have managed incontinence -Must be able to eat with minimal cueing, managed incontinence, managed behaviors, and will be able to participate and benefit from the program elements Hours: Among Friends: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday 11am-4pm Time with Friends: Thursday 11am-3pm Email (503) 588-6303 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 588-6303 Wendy Kilgore [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Home visit and completion of care plan is required prior to first visit. FEES: Among Friends: $60 per day includes 5 hours of respite care, including lunch and a snack Time with Friends: $35 per day includes 4 hours of programming including lunch Medicaid (OHP) and private pay accepted, fee waivers and scholarships are available DOCUMENTS: Call for information AREA SERVED: Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on Portland Road (Highway 99) at the intersection of Silverton Road, Highland Street, and Brooks Avenue in Northeast Salem. Services: Adult Out of Home Respite Care Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - FIX-IT BRIGADE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OUTREACH PROGRAMS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WELLNESS ON WHEELS VAN If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER 50+
